Class Keys

FluentGpu.Foundation

FluentGpu.Foundation.dll

Well-known virtual-key codes (Win32 VK_*) used by the input router.

Methods

IsAccessKeyCandidate(int)

True for VK 'A'..'Z' / '0'..'9' — the access-key (Alt mnemonic) candidates.

public static bool IsAccessKeyCandidate(int vk)

Parameters

vk int

Returns

bool
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
